name: Orchid
description: Master of deceptive pollination intelligence. Chemical pheromone mimicry, insect morphology replication, and species-specific olfactory signals achieve reproduction with zero nectar reward — a zero-energy deception strategy. Multimodal signal convergence (chemical, visual, tactile) exploits pollinator sensory systems with extraordinary specificity. Over 28,000 species, the largest flowering plant family.

core_attributes.pattern: chemical pheromone mimicry, zero-reward deception, species-specific exploitation
